title: Natural Camera
description: A mod that changes the first-person camera, making it more realistic
body:
NATURAL CAMERA - ALPHA TEST ("Prototype", it may be unstable)

Compatibility with TacZ scopes since v0.0.3 (tested on tacz-1.20.1-1.1.8-hotfix).

 

Disclaimer

The Natural Camera mod is focused on realism and first-person immersion. It changes how the camera moves during walking, sprinting, crouching, jumping, landing, and turning. Because of this, the camera motion may feel stronger or more noticeable than vanilla Minecraft. If you are sensitive to motion-heavy visuals, please use the mod with caution.

 

 

Natural Camera is a first-person realism mod that replaces the flat vanilla feel with procedural camera motion. It adds walking sway, vertical bob, lateral sway, turning motion, crouch movement, jump and landing impact, and a slow-walk mode for more natural movement.

The goal of the mod is simple: make Minecraft movement feel heavier, more physical, and more believable without breaking normal gameplay.

 

REQUIRES: Forge + VinConfig

 

Functionality as of 0.0.2-a:

 

Procedural Camera Movement

  • Walk sway: The camera sways naturally while walking instead of moving in a flat vanilla way.
  • Vertical bob: The camera moves up and down during steps for a more physical walking feeling.
  • Lateral sway: Side-to-side motion adds extra weight and realism to movement.
  • Yaw rotation: The camera reacts to turning and movement with smoother rotational motion.
  • Pitch tilt: The camera tilts slightly up and down based on movement, impact, and motion state.
  • Crouch motion: Sneaking changes the camera pose in a subtle but noticeable way.
  • Jump and landing impact: Jumping and landing now produce stronger camera reactions, especially after real falls.

 

Landing and Fall Behavior

  • Fall-based strength tiers: Bigger falls create stronger landing reactions.

    •  

    Real Walk Mode

    • Left Alt keybind: Hold the key to activate a slower, more realistic walk mode.
    • Changeable in Controls: The keybind can be remapped in Minecraft’s key settings.
    • Better realism: Walking and sneaking feel calmer and less like mini-sprinting.

     

    Configurable Camera Tuning

    • Walk Sway Strength: Controls how strong the overall step sway feels.
    • Vertical Bob Strength: Controls how much the camera rises and falls while moving.
    • Lateral Sway Strength: Controls side movement and sideways weight.
    • Yaw Rotation Strength: Controls the amount of turn-based camera rotation.
    • Pitch Tilt Strength: Controls how strong the camera tilts up and down.
    • Crouch Strength: Controls how much sneaking changes the camera motion.
    • Jump and Landing Strength: Controls jump lift and landing impact.
    • Speed Sensitivity: Controls how strongly movement speed affects the camera response.

     

     

    Gameplay Notes

    • First-person focused: The mod is designed for first-person realism.
    • Vanilla gameplay intact: The mod changes camera and movement feel without replacing core Minecraft gameplay systems.
    • Better immersion: The camera reacts more like a real body moving through space instead of a fixed floating view.
    • Movement style: Sprint remains fast and sharp, while normal walking and sneaking are intentionally calmer and slower.

     

    Known Limitation

    • Anti-cheat servers: Some servers with anti-cheat may not fully allow slow-walk behavior or may treat movement changes differently.
